name: akbun-cardnews-c
description: Card news toolkit — turns images and text into card copy, image-generation prompts, and Figma/Canva-ready SVG cards

interface.shortDescription: Card news copy, image prompts, and Figma/Canva-ready SVG generation
interface.longDescription: Turns user-provided images and text into an editorial-style card news set: it writes the per-card copy (or drafts it from the source material when no copy is given), produces English prompts for image-generation AI agents, and renders each card as an SVG with editable text that imports cleanly into Figma or Canva.
defaultPrompt: 이 내용으로 카드뉴스 만들어줘: <주제 또는 원고>
이 이미지를 분석해서 카드뉴스 문구와 SVG를 만들어줘
